nasb.text: He who gets wisdom loves his own soul; He who keeps understanding will find good.

esv.text: Whoever gets sense loves his own soul; he who keeps understanding will discover good.

cnv.text: 得著智慧的，愛惜自己的性命； 保持明達的，必得益處。

ccb.text: 得到智慧的珍惜生命， 持守悟性的享受福乐。

csbs.text: 得智慧心的，爱惜自己的灵魂， 持守聪慧的，找得到福份。
